narrative:
08 Ohio Senate district has 267,172 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a clear Republican lean of 8.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.1% D−R vs -18.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
